pull.title: Update libmultiprocess subtree to fix test timeout
pull.body:
- https://github.com/bitcoin-core/libmultiprocess/pull/266
- https://github.com/bitcoin-core/libmultiprocess/pull/267
- https://github.com/bitcoin-core/libmultiprocess/pull/268

Branch is based on 613a548648880314e78c3045d0ded12e29a4f036 from #34804 for easy backport.

Fixes #34975.

events.body: The following sections might be updated with supplementary metadata relevant to reviewers and maintainers. ### Reviews See [the guideline](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#code-review) for information on the review process. | Type | Reviewers | | ---- | --------- | | ACK | [ryanofsky](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34977#pullrequestreview-4071019862), [achow101](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34977#issuecomment-4201967004) | If your review is incorrectly listed, please copy-paste <!--meta-tag:bot-skip--> into the comment that the bot should ignore.

@fanquake should I open a separate backport PR like we did for #34804 or can it just go into the normal backport flow? (assuming a slow CI test timeout is worth a backport, and/or we fix more things later)
No test timeout, but that's not likely in a single CI run.
Upstream looks merged, is this ready for review?

Updated after https://github.com/bitcoin-core/libmultiprocess/pull/266 landed.

Marked ready for review, but if https://github.com/bitcoin-core/libmultiprocess/pull/268 is important, then I'll just update this PR after it lands. I don't think it's relevant to v31.

events.body: This could also be closed in favour of #35014, which already has #268 + a commit to drop the related workaround.

Reopened and updated to include https://github.com/bitcoin-core/libmultiprocess/pull/268, because the test commit added in #35014 seems to have a conflict with master, causing CI to not run. It may be easier to just merge the subtree update first.

Code review ACK 66b4e30ec8000514b3c0a65fb5085cb6338ebda7. Reviewed changes and verified subtree matches. Since this branch is based on 613a548648880314e78c3045d0ded12e29a4f036 it can be merged into both 31.x and master branches (if another PR is opened for 31.x).

ACK 66b4e30ec8000514b3c0a65fb5085cb6338ebda7

Going to merge this so that the author of #35014 doesn't need to figure out subtree updating
Should I open a seperate backport PR or can it go in #35028?
There is a subtree pull in #35028.
